inspection.scope: Full visual residential inspection with state-pack readiness gates, photo evidence, inspector-approved findings, and final signoff.

photos.label: Front roof plane uploaded during review

findings.title: Exterior outlet lacks weather cover
findings.narrative: A front exterior receptacle was observed without a weather-resistant in-use cover at the time of inspection.
findings.recommendation: Recommend correction by a qualified electrical contractor before continued exterior use.

findings.title: Roof review draft
findings.narrative: Inspector should review roof conditions at Front elevation. Confirm visible defects, limitations, age indicators, safety concerns, and whether contractor evaluation is recommended.
findings.recommendation: Inspector to confirm and edit final recommendation before export.

aiSuggestions.title: Roof review draft
aiSuggestions.draft: Inspector should review roof conditions at Front elevation. Confirm visible defects, limitations, age indicators, safety concerns, and whether contractor evaluation is recommended.

statePack.name: Florida Starter Pack

forms.title: General Home Inspection Report
forms.description: Structured report sections for a licensed inspector to review, edit, approve, and export.

forms.title: Wind Mitigation Readiness Worksheet
forms.description: Draft capture checklist for wind mitigation evidence. Final form language must be validated before production filing.

forms.title: 4-Point Readiness Worksheet
forms.description: Draft capture checklist for roof, electrical, HVAC, and plumbing evidence. Carrier-specific forms must be reviewed separately.

disclaimers: AI content is assistive only and cannot finalize a report.
A licensed inspector must review every field before export.
State and carrier-specific form language must be verified before production use.
